name: JBL Flip 7 Bluetooth Speaker
introText: The JBL Flip 7 is the best all-around portable speaker — IP68 waterproofing, 12 hours of battery life, and JBL's signature balanced sound in a 540g package for $179 CAD.
whatWorks: IP68 waterproofing is the highest rating in its class — fully submersible for 30 minutes at 1.5m depth; handles pool splashes, beach sand, and rain without concern.
20W output produces sound that fills a medium room — the Flip 7's dual drivers and passive radiator deliver bass that punches well above its size and price.
worthKnowing: Sound is loud but not room-filling for large spaces — the Flip 7 is perfect for outdoor gatherings of 8–10 people; for larger events or rooms, consider the Bose SoundLink Max.
PartyBoost allows daisy-chaining multiple JBL speakers — useful if you own two JBL speakers for wider coverage; limited to other PartyBoost-compatible JBL models.

commonComplaints.title: Bass can be boomy at high volumes
commonComplaints.body: At 80%+ volume, the passive radiator overdoes the bass in some tracks. Reducing bass via the JBL app improves the balance.

commonComplaints.title: Lacks USB-A passthrough for phone charging
commonComplaints.body: The Flip 7 removed the USB-A output from previous Flip versions — you can no longer charge a phone from the speaker's battery.

commonComplaints.title: Carrying loop is basic
commonComplaints.body: The rubber carrying loop is functional but less sturdy than competitors like the UE Wonderboom's 360° loop. Not a dealbreaker but noted.

verdict: The JBL Flip 7 is the best portable speaker for most people — IP68 waterproofing, excellent sound for its size, 12-hour battery, and JBL's reliable build quality at $179. For premium sound at higher volume, the Bose SoundLink Max is the step up.

realBuyers.quote: Camping, beach, kayaking. This thing goes everywhere. Survived being dropped in the river.
Best portable speaker I've owned across 4 JBLs. The 7 is a clear upgrade from the 6.
Sound fills my apartment. Can't believe this comes from a speaker this small.

metaDescription: JBL Flip 7 review Canada: IP68, 12-hr battery, Bluetooth 5.3, 540g. $179 CAD. Best portable Bluetooth speaker for Canadians.
